head_sha_note: 6f9a5d6 is the codex-review fix commit (final code/test commit). An additional chore commit carrying this updated closure artifact sits on top as the actual branch HEAD (its sha self-references and so is not pinned here).
commits: c79ccf9: docs(0.5.1-SET-loader): design memo — AirlockSettings fields, precedence, test matrix
38ed297: test(0.5.1-SET-loader): RED precedence matrix for AirlockSettings loader
a0b20c6: feat(0.5.1-SET-loader): AirlockSettings loader + proxy startup wiring
be8e21f: test(0.5.1-SET-loader): RED for codex review findings — windows/budgets consistency + failover inner-shape
6f9a5d6: fix(0.5.1-SET-loader): codex review — consistent unconfigured defaults + failover inner-shape validation
chore(0.5.1-SET-loader): closure artifact + design memo (branch HEAD)

review_findings_addressed.description: Unconfigured get_settings() returned AirlockSettings() with budget_windows={} while provider_budgets held the full 50/50/25/25 default map — internally inconsistent.
review_findings_addressed.fix: get_settings() now returns load_airlock_settings({}) when _configured is None, so budget_windows is keyed for every default provider_budgets entry (each window 86400).

review_findings_addressed.description: _load_failover_map iterated a string AIRLOCK_FAILOVER_MAP value char-by-char, e.g. {"a": "bc"} -> {"a": ["b","c"]}.
review_findings_addressed.fix: Validate every value is a list before coercing; on wrong inner shape, warn and fall back to config then default.

blockers_encountered.description: `uv run pytest` resolved a user-site pytest 9.1.0 on Python 3.12 where litellm is not importable; the project venv is Python 3.10 and pytest lives in the optional `test` extra, not the default sync.
blockers_encountered.resolution: Ran the suite via the venv interpreter with the test extra: `uv run --extra test python -m pytest`. No source change required; reported to orchestrator as the correct local test invocation for this worktree.

additional_changes_made_in_scope: Added an optional injectable `env` parameter to `load_airlock_settings(config, env=None)` (defaults to os.environ) purely to keep the precedence-matrix tests deterministic without mutating process env. Singleton seam `configure_settings`/`get_settings` reads os.environ as specified.
Codex review CONCERN addressed (2 medium findings) TDD-style: RED commit be8e21f, fix commit 6f9a5d6. Test count 34 -> 37.
agent_verify_result: pass (37 passed in test_fast_settings.py; regression: 122 passed across test_fast_router.py + test_fast_monitor.py + test_transparency_config.py; ruff check + format clean on all modified files)
next_step_for_orchestrator: Pack 0.5.1-SET-loader on branch feat/0.5.1-SET-loader at 6f9a5d6 (+ closure chore on top); review, verify, merge. Loader is constructed at startup but intentionally not yet consumed — SET-unify migrates router/monitor/breaker consumers and fixes the R6 provider_budget_config nesting bug; SET-warnratio collapses the two warn-ratio constants. Note local tests must run via `uv run --extra test python -m pytest`.
